summary: Both screenshots are acceptable: primary calculator controls are visible and usable, with only secondary reference content continuing below on mobile.

screenshots.name: Image #1
screenshots.notes: Desktop view shows the full calculator keypad, display, memory controls, status, history, and keyboard reference without important controls cut off.

screenshots.name: Image #2

recommendations: Screenshots are suitable for README and social posting.
